item.name: Register Super Admin (First Time Use Only)

request.description: Fetch educator master records used in course creation.
Create educator before mapping courseEducatorId in courses.
Create subject category for courseSubjectCategoryId mapping.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Full Stack Development",
  "description": "Mastering Node.js and MongoDB",
  "image": "https://example.com/course-thumbnail.jpg",
  "ordered": 1,
  "level": "Intermediate",
  "status": true,
  "courseEducatorId": "{{educator_id}}",
  "courseSubjectCategoryId": "{{category_id}}",
  "videoCategoryId": "{{video_category_id}}",
  "pcMaterialId": "{{material_id}}"
}
